mapper.sql: rr.id, rr.student_id, rr.renewal_type, rr.target_id, rr.application_date, rr.acceptance_date, rr.complete_date, rr.renewal_status, rr.result, rr.new_valid_until, rr.handler_id, rr.handler_name, rr.remark, rr.deleted, rr.create_time, rr.update_time, sp.student_no, sp.chinese_name, sp.english_name
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO visa_renewal_record (student_id, renewal_type, target_id, application_date, acceptance_date, complete_date, renewal_status, result, new_valid_until, handler_id, handler_name, remark) VALUES (#{studentId}, #{renewalType}, #{targetId}, #{applicationDate}, #{acceptanceDate}, #{completeDate}, #{renewalStatus}, #{result}, #{newValidUntil}, #{handlerId}, #{handlerName}, #{remark})
mapper.update: UPDATE visa_renewal_record SET student_id = #{studentId}, renewal_type = #{renewalType}, target_id = #{targetId}, application_date = #{applicationDate}, acceptance_date = #{acceptanceDate}, complete_date = #{completeDate}, renewal_status = #{renewalStatus}, result = #{result}, new_valid_until = #{newValidUntil}, handler_id = #{handlerId}, handler_name = #{handlerName}, remark = #{remark}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
UPDATE visa_renewal_record SET deleted = 1, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
mapper.select: SELECT FROM visa_renewal_record rr LEFT JOIN student_profile sp ON sp.id = rr.student_id AND sp.deleted = 0 WHERE rr.id = #{id} AND rr.deleted = 0
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM visa_renewal_record rr LEFT JOIN student_profile sp ON sp.id = rr.student_id AND sp.deleted = 0

SELECT FROM visa_renewal_record rr LEFT JOIN student_profile sp ON sp.id = rr.student_id AND sp.deleted = 0
ORDER BY rr.create_time DESC, rr.id DESC LIMIT #{query.offset}, #{query.limit}

SELECT FROM visa_renewal_record rr LEFT JOIN student_profile sp ON sp.id = rr.student_id AND sp.deleted = 0 WHERE rr.student_id = #{studentId} AND rr.deleted = 0 ORDER BY rr.create_time DESC, rr.id DESC
